segments.speaker: 题目19/20
segments.text: Listen to an announcement in a classroom . This Thursday at 7:00p.m.in the lecture hall, Professor George Benzi will give a guest lecture on recent advances in string theory. I've also uploaded one of professor benzy's papers to the cowebsite. I highly recommend reading the paper and going to the lecture. Our current units on black holes is largely based on professor benzy's work. If you attend the lecture, you'll be able to earn extra credit submitting a one page reflection on what you learn from it by next week.
